title: Subagents, Parallelism, and Coordination · Goal Brief: Shared State
summary: Coordinate specialist agents without duplicate or conflicting work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops shared state increment in a bounded multi-agent execution map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Coordinate shared files, locks, messages, and ownership boundaries.
Give a subagent the minimum context required without losing governing constraints.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
